props.name: severity
props.description: Severity/status of the alert

props.name: isClosable
props.description: Whether the alert can be dismissed by the user

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS class to merge onto the root element

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the alert is dismissed

AlertDialog.description:
AlertDialog root component. Wraps Reka UI's AlertDialogRoot.

Uses Options API / render-function style to avoid Vue SFC compiled template
from forwarding `open: undefined` to AlertDialogRoot — same pattern as Modal.vue.
Reka's `useVModel` checks `props.open === undefined` to choose uncontrolled
vs controlled mode.

props.name: items
props.description: Static items list — used when no loadItems is provided

props.name: loadItems
props.description: Async data source: called on every query change

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Debounce delay for loadItems calls (ms). 0 = no debounce.

props.name: filterFunction
props.description: Custom filter function: return true to include item

Drawer.description:
Drawer root component. Wraps Reka UI's DialogRoot.

Uses Options API / render-function style to avoid Vue SFC compiled template
from forwarding `open: undefined` to DialogRoot — same pattern as Modal.vue.
Reka's `useVModel` checks `props.open === undefined` to choose uncontrolled
vs controlled mode.

props.name: legend
props.description: Text content for the <legend> element; omit to render fieldset without a legend

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables all form controls inside this fieldset

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the <fieldset> element

props.name: validationSchema
props.description: VeeValidate-compatible validation schema (Yup, Zod, or plain object rules)

props.name: initialValues
props.description: Initial field values

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Form submit handler, called with validated form values

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the <form> element

Modal.description:
Modal root component. Wraps Reka UI's DialogRoot.

Uses Options API / render-function style to avoid Vue SFC compiled template
from forwarding `open: undefined` to DialogRoot — same pattern as Popover.vue.
Reka's `useVModel` checks `props.open === undefined` to choose uncontrolled
vs controlled mode.

props.name: page
props.description: Current page number (v-model:page)

props.name: defaultPage
props.description: Default page for uncontrolled usage

props.name: itemsPerPage
props.description: Number of items per page

props.name: totalItems
props.description: Total number of items

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: Number of sibling pages shown on each side of current page

props.name: showEdges
props.description: Whether to show first/last page edge buttons

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant

props.name: type
props.description: Pagination type: 'numeric' for page numbers, 'cursor' for relay-style

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the entire pagination is disabled

props.name: beforeCursor
props.description: Cursor mode: before cursor value

props.name: afterCursor
props.description: Cursor mode: after cursor value

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS class

props.name: value
props.description: Page number this item represents

Popover.description:
Popover root component. Wraps Reka UI's PopoverRoot.

Important: we use the Options-API / render-function style here (not `<script setup>`)
to avoid Vue SFC's compiled template from forwarding `open: undefined` to PopoverRoot.
Reka's `useVModel` checks `props.open === undefined` to choose uncontrolled vs controlled
mode, but a template `:open="props.open"` always provides the key (even as `undefined`),
forcing controlled mode and breaking `defaultOpen`. The render function lets us omit the
key entirely when `open` is not provided by the consumer.

props.name: selection
props.description: Row selection mode. 'single' = radio-style; 'multiple' = checkbox + shift+click; 'none' = disabled

props.name: rowSelection
props.description: Controlled row selection state (Record<rowId, boolean>). Use v-model:rowSelection

props.name: virtualRows
props.description:
Opt-in row virtualization via @tanstack/vue-virtual.
- false (default): all rows render in a standard <tbody>
- true: always render via TableVirtualBody (only visible rows in DOM)
- number N: auto-enable virtualization when data.length > N

props.name: estimatedRowHeight
props.description: Estimated row height in px used by the virtualizer (default: 44)

props.name: virtualizerOverscan
props.description: Extra rows to render outside the visible viewport (default: 8)

props.name: row
props.description: When row is provided, this cell is a body row checkbox. When absent, it's the header select-all.

props.name: table
props.description: Required for the header select-all variant

props.name: isReadOnly
props.description: Override group-level read-only; when true, delete button is hidden

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the toast is visible

props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss duration in ms (0 = no auto-dismiss)

props.name: position
props.description: Viewport position variant

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS class

props.name: altText
props.description: Required by Reka UI for screen reader announcements

props.name: label
props.description: Screen reader label for toast announcements

props.name: duration
props.description: Default auto-dismiss duration in ms for all toasts

props.name: disableSwipe
props.description: Disable swipe-to-dismiss gesture

props.name: swipeDirection
props.description: Direction of swipe that dismisses the toast

props.name: swipeThreshold
props.description: Swipe distance threshold in pixels before close triggers

props.name: position
props.description: Default position for toasts in this viewport

props.name: class
props.description: Additional CSS class for the viewport container

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Keyboard hotkey to focus the viewport (accessibility)

props.name: label
props.description: Screen reader label for the viewport

Tooltip.description:
Tooltip root component. Wraps Reka UI's TooltipRoot.

Uses Options API / render-function style to avoid Vue SFC compiled template
from forwarding `open: undefined` to TooltipRoot — same pattern as Popover.vue.
Reka's `useVModel` checks `props.open === undefined` to choose uncontrolled
vs controlled mode.
